debug_info.goal:
A E : Fin 8
hE : E = A + 4
a : ℕ → ℕ
ha_def : ∀ (n : ℕ), a n = Fintype.card { p // A + ∑ i, ↑↑(p i) = E }
n : ℕ
hn : 0 < n
⊢ a (2 * n - 1) = 0

failed_attempts:
rw [ha_def, Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff]
  rintro ⟨p, hp⟩
  simp only [hE, add_left_inj] at hp
  let f : Fin 8 →+ ZMod 2 :=
  { toFun := fun x ↦ x.val
    map_zero' := rfl
    map_add' := fun x y ↦ by
      simp only [Fin.val_add, ZMod.nat_cast_mod_of_dvd (by norm_num : 2 ∣ 8)]
      rfl }
  apply_fun f at hp
  simp only [map_sum, AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk] at hp
  have h_odd : ∀ i, f (p i) = 1 := fun i ↦ by
    rcases Int.units_eq_one_or (p i) with h | h <;> rw [h] <;> rfl
  simp only [h_odd, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one] at hp
  rw [show f 4 = 0 by rfl] at hp
  rw [ZMod.nat_cast_eq_iff, Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Nat.mod_two_of_odd] at hp
  · contradiction
  · use n - 1
    rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, mul_one, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 hn)]
